tasks.title: Claude Code JSONL reader (Phase 1, replaces stats-cache)
tasks.description: New poller that parses ~/.claude/projects/**/*.jsonl and emits one PromptEvent per assistant turn with real per-turn token counts from message.usage. Dedupes by Anthropic message ID across concurrent sessions. Source tag: claude-code-jsonl. signal_quality: HIGH (real data). Replaces (deprecates but keeps working) the stats-cache poller from v0.10.2.

tasks.title: Codex CLI JSONL reader (Phase 2)
tasks.description: Parses ~/.codex/sessions/*.jsonl. Same pattern as Claude Code JSONL — per-turn usage block. Source: codex-jsonl. Maps to ProviderOpenAI + Codex Plus plan.

tasks.title: GitHub Copilot usage client (Phase 2)
tasks.description: GET api.github.com/copilot_internal/user using OAuth token from ~/.config/github-copilot/hosts.json. Returns quota_snapshots {chat, premium_interactions, percent_remaining, reset}. Source: copilot-internal. signal_quality: HIGH.

tasks.title: Cursor usage client (Phase 2)
tasks.description: GET cursor.com/api/usage?user=<id> using WorkosCursorSessionToken cookie extracted from Cursor IDE local storage. Per-model request counts + monthly invoice. Source: cursor-web. signal_quality: HIGH but grey (cookie-based).

tasks.title: claude.ai session-cookie /usage scraper (Phase 3)
tasks.description: GET claude.ai/api/organizations/{org_id}/usage with sessionKey cookie. Returns five_hour + seven_day + seven_day_opus utilization_pct + reset_at. signal_quality: HIGH (Anthropic's own data) with ToS-grey caveat. Operator pastes cookie via tokenops anthropic cookie set.

tasks.title: Gemini CLI integration
tasks.description: Gemini CLI env setup. Smoke test.

tasks.title: Efficiency scoring algorithm
tasks.description: Score per workflow/agent/user. Combines waste signals. Progression over time.

tasks.title: Tier 3: interactive Vue+D3 dashboard via MCP html resource
tasks.description: Bundle the existing web/dashboard Vue app as a single-file HTML blob (Vite single-file plugin). Return via new tokenops_dashboard MCP tool as ResourceContent with MimeType=text/html. Embed D3 charts: window-burn sparkline, plan-quota gauge, real-vs-synthetic ratio donut. EXPERIMENTAL — depends on client iframe support. Acceptance: tokenops_dashboard renders in at least one MCP client (likely Claude Desktop) with an interactive chart.

tasks.title: MCP server endpoints for rules
tasks.description: Expose rules.analyze, rules.conflicts, rules.compress, rules.inject, rules.bench over MCP. Read-only; respects redaction.

tasks.title: OpenAI Agents SDK middleware
tasks.description: Middleware integrating Agents SDK with TokenOps proxy and event emission.

tasks.title: Optimization engine core
tasks.description: Pluggable optimizer pipeline. Modes passive/interactive/replay. Latency budget enforcement.

tasks.title: Implement Telemetry Contract and Lineage Control
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Telemetry Contract and Lineage Control. Add explicit data-contract and lineage docs for key event fields used across proxy, storage, OTLP, and dashboard. Include schema change policy, compatibility tests, and owner map for each telemetry contract.

tasks.title: Define core event schema
tasks.description: Prompt/Workflow/Optimization/Coaching event types as Go structs and Protobuf. OpenTelemetry-compatible attributes. Versioning policy.

tasks.title: CLI: tokenops rules analyze|conflicts|compress|inject|bench
tasks.description: Cobra subcommand tree under tokenops rules. Renders ROI, conflicts, compression diff, dynamic inject preview, benchmark results.

tasks.title: MCP server for TokenOps queries
tasks.description: MCP server exposing spend, forecast, replay, optimization queries.

tasks.title: `tokenops_session_budget` MCP tool: 2h headroom prediction
tasks.description: New MCP tool: given current window consumption + window duration + recent burn rate, predict whether the operator will hit the rate-limit cap within the next 2 hours. Returns {confidence: low|medium|high, will_hit_cap_within: duration, recommended_action: 'continue' | 'slow_down' | 'switch_model' | 'wait_for_reset', headroom_until_cap: duration}. Math: extrapolate the last 30min message rate against the remaining window cap. Pure function in internal/contexts/spend/plans/budget.go; MCP wrapper in internal/mcp/plan_tools.go. Tests cover empty-history, high-burn-imminent-cap, low-burn-safe scenarios. Acceptance: a Claude Code agent calling tokenops_session_budget mid-conversation gets actionable JSON without configuring anything beyond `tokenops plan set anthropic claude-max-20x`.

tasks.title: claude-max alias migration shim
tasks.description: plans.Lookup honours a deprecation table: 'claude-max' -> 'claude-max-20x' with a Deprecated flag. tokenops plan set 'claude-max' writes the modern name to config but stdout prints 'renamed claude-max -> claude-max-20x (Max 20x default tier; override with --tier 5x to pick the 5x catalog entry)'. Catalog test asserts every deprecation maps to an existing modern name. Acceptance: stale docs / blog posts pasting 'claude-max' produce a useful config write, not an error.

tasks.title: VSCode extension MVP
tasks.description: Extension surfacing burn graph, optimization suggestions, replay link. Reuses dashboard data.

tasks.title: Workflow trace reconstruction
tasks.description: Reconstruct multi-step workflow from prompt events. Context growth tracking.

tasks.title: Disabled-subsystem structured error contract
tasks.description: When Storage.Enabled=false: tokenops_spend_summary, tokenops_burn_rate, tokenops_forecast, tokenops_top_consumers, tokenops_audit, tokenops_domain_events return {"error":"storage_disabled","hint":"run `tokenops init` then restart daemon"} with non-success status code on HTTP, MCP error envelope. Same pattern for Rules.Enabled=false (rules_* tools) and Providers=nil (proxy routes). Tests cover each gated path. Acceptance: no MCP tool returns empty success when its subsystem is disabled.

tasks.title: Implement Coaching Engine
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Coaching Engine. Replays expensive sessions generates optimized alternatives teaches prompt efficiency. Local models async batch analysis.

tasks.title: Implement Data Model and Telemetry
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Data Model and Telemetry. Event schema for prompts workflows optimizations coaching. Local-first with optional cloud emission. OpenTelemetry compatible.

tasks.title: Auto-pick cheapest in-plan model per configured plan
tasks.description: internal/contexts/coaching/router.go: given Config.Plans, return (provider, model, endpoint, credential-source) tuple. Mapping: anthropic claude-max-* | claude-pro -> (anthropic, claude-haiku-4.5, https://api.anthropic.com, plan-session); openai gpt-plus | gpt-team -> (openai, gpt-5-mini, https://api.openai.com, plan-session); copilot-* -> (github, copilot-cheap-default, https://api.github.com/copilot, plan-session); cursor-* -> (cursor, cursor-cheap-default, cursor-endpoint, plan-session); none configured -> (local, llama3.2:3b, http://127.0.0.1:11434, none) if Ollama reachable, else disable. Acceptance: unit tests for every plan name map to the right tuple.

tasks.title: Token consumption forecasting
tasks.description: Time-series forecast per user/workflow with confidence intervals. Holt-Winters or equivalent.

tasks.title: Implement TokenOps Proxy
tasks.description: Implement the feature: TokenOps Proxy. Local proxy intercepting requests between clients and LLM providers. Foundation for all other components.

tasks.title: Add CostSource field to PromptEvent
tasks.description: Extend pkg/eventschema/prompt.go with `CostSource` enum: `metered` (default), `plan_included`, `trial`. Add JSON tag with omitempty when metered so old envelopes round-trip unchanged. Bump eventschema schema version + add golden test in pkg/eventschema/golden_test.go covering all three values. Acceptance: existing events deserialize without error; new field round-trips; schema version bumped consistently across CHANGELOG + version.go.

tasks.title: Coaching LLM config + CLI override
tasks.description: config.Coaching.LLM block: Mode (auto|local|cloud|off), Backend overrides. CLI: tokenops coach set-model {auto|local:<model>|cloud:<provider>:<model>|off}. Hot-reload picks up changes. Acceptance: `tokenops coach set-model local:llama3.2:3b` writes config; coaching switches to local on next pipeline tick.

tasks.title: Add blockers[] + next_actions[] to status
tasks.description: Extend internal/daemon (or wherever /healthz, /readyz, /version, MCP status are wired) so status responses include: blockers []string (e.g., "storage_disabled", "providers_unconfigured", "rules_disabled") and next_actions []string (e.g., "run `tokenops init`"). Derive from Config struct. Unit tests for each blocker state. Acceptance: tokenops_status MCP response returns populated arrays when subsystems off; empty when all healthy; /readyz HTTP exposes same JSON shape.

tasks.title: Implement Operator Golden Path + Wedge KPI
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Operator Golden Path + Wedge KPI. Add a clear operator-first onboarding path that proves value quickly: a 5-minute golden path from install to first measurable token insight, with explicit expected output and a wedge KPI definition in docs.

tasks.title: TLS termination + self-signed cert
tasks.description: Generate self-signed CA + leaf cert on first run. OS trust store guidance. HTTPS upstream forwarding with SNI.

tasks.title: RuleEvent schema and source taxonomy
tasks.description: Extend pkg/eventschema with RuleSourceEvent (ingest/parse) and RuleAnalysisEvent (per-rule ROI snapshot). Define RuleSource taxonomy: claude_md, agents_md, cursor, mcp_policy, repo_convention, custom. Bump SchemaVersion minor. Tests.

tasks.title: Implement Optimization Engine
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Optimization Engine. Reduces token waste in real time via compression deduplication retrieval pruning context trimming adaptive routing.

tasks.title: Session replay engine
tasks.description: Reload past session, run optimizer in replay mode, side-by-side original vs optimized. Token + spend savings.

tasks.title: Empty-state scorecard: first-week checklist
tasks.description: When LiveKPIs.FVTComputed=false AND TEUComputed=false AND SACComputed=false, scorecard.Build returns a Scorecard variant with OverallGrade="warming_up" and a Checklist []ChecklistItem (description, completed bool, next_action). Items: (a) configure proxy provider, (b) wire optimizer for TEU > 0, (c) accumulate 7 days of attributed events. Don't fabricate an F grade from defaults. CLI/MCP renderers fall through to checklist. Tests: empty store -> checklist; one KPI computed -> grade returned. Acceptance: tokenops scorecard on a fresh install shows guidance, not F.

tasks.title: Add plans config + env override
tasks.description: Extend internal/config: add Plans map[string]string (provider→plan_name) read from `plans:` YAML block + TOKENOPS_PLAN_<PROVIDER> env vars. Validate plan names against the catalog at Config.Validate(); reject unknown plans with helpful error listing valid options. Acceptance: Config round-trip preserves Plans; invalid plan name fails Validate with listed alternatives.

tasks.title: Prompt redaction and secret detection
tasks.description: Pattern + entropy-based secret detection. Redaction layer applied before non-local emission. Configurable rules.

tasks.title: CHANGELOG + README sweep for isolation cycle
tasks.description: Document --include-demo opt-in, the new tokenops_help tool, the data-sources surface, and the rules walker fix. README quickstart adds 'real vs synthetic data' note: tokenops demo's output is opt-in for analytics by default.

tasks.title: Dashboard auth for self-hosted
tasks.description: Local auth (admin password or token). Optional OIDC stub. Session management.

tasks.title: Implement Operator Wedge KPI Scorecard
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Operator Wedge KPI Scorecard. Define a product wedge scorecard tied to operator outcomes: first-value time, token efficiency uplift, and spend attribution completeness. Publish metric definitions, baseline capture workflow, and rollout thresholds in docs + CLI output.

tasks.title: SSE streaming passthrough
tasks.description: Stream upstream SSE without buffering. Token counting on the fly. Backpressure and cancel propagation.

tasks.title: Spike anomaly detection
tasks.description: Detect anomalous token spikes per workflow/user. Statistical baseline + deviation thresholds.

tasks.title: CLI + MCP render window headroom
tasks.description: Update tokenops plan headroom text output to include window line (e.g. '47/200 msgs/5h (24%) — resets in 2h13m'). tokenops_plan_headroom MCP response carries the new window_* fields. Smoke test: tokenops demo --plan claude-max-20x then headroom shows non-zero window_pct.

tasks.title: Implement Rule Intelligence
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Rule Intelligence. Operational rules (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, Cursor, MCP policies) as first-class telemetry — ROI, conflicts, compression, dynamic injection, benchmarking. Issue #12.

tasks.description: Implement the feature: Security and Privacy. Local-first self-hostable privacy-preserving. Opt-in cloud telemetry. Air-gapped deployment supported.

tasks.title: Quality preservation gate

tasks.title: OTLP telemetry exporter
tasks.description: OpenTelemetry-compatible OTLP exporter for events and metrics. Opt-in. Respects redaction.

tasks.title: Per-model stacked area chart on dashboard cost panel
tasks.description: When the model dropdown is set to All, render a stacked area chart per-model so operators see the contribution mix. Switches to a single line when a specific model is selected. Acceptance: model breakdown visible in cost panel; legend shows top 5 models; D3 colour scale stable across refreshes.

tasks.title: Provider routing for OpenAI Anthropic Gemini
tasks.description: Reverse proxy with per-provider upstream config, base-URL rewriting, auth passthrough, normalization to canonical form.

tasks.title: Demo + docs for plan mode

Update README quickstart with a plan-mode example and add `docs/plan-cost-model.md` covering supported plans + how to add custom ones. Acceptance: `tokenops demo --plan claude-max && tokenops plan` prints non-zero ConsumedPct.

tasks.title: Rule ROI engine

tasks.title: Retrieval chunk pruning
tasks.description: Detect oversized retrieval contexts, prune by relevance score.

tasks.title: Per-provider tokenizer adapters
tasks.description: tiktoken (OpenAI), Anthropic tokenizer, Gemini tokenizer behind common interface. Pre-request and post-response counting.

tasks.title: ClickHouse schema and ingestion
tasks.description: Schema for all event types. Direct insert or Kafka pipeline ingest. Materialized views.

tasks.title: Rule source ingestion + watcher
tasks.description: internal/rules ingest CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .cursor/rules, MCP policy files, repo conventions. Glob discovery + fs.Notify watcher. Normalize to RuleDocument with section anchors, frontmatter, checksums. Persist to sqlite.

tasks.title: Token heatmap
tasks.description: Heatmap by workflow/agent/model. Drilldown to timeline.

tasks.title: Implement `tokenops demo` CLI seeder
tasks.description: Add internal/cli demo subcommand. Seeds 7 days of synthetic events via existing pkg/eventschema + internal/storage/sqlite writer: ~50 requests/day across 3 models (claude-opus-4-7, claude-sonnet-4-6, gpt-4o), 2 providers, 4 workflow_ids, 3 agent_ids, realistic token + cost values. Includes a few budget.exceeded + optimization.applied events to populate scorecard. Flags: --days N (default 7), --reset to clear before seeding, --dry-run. Acceptance: after init+demo, tokenops_spend_summary returns nonzero, tokenops_top_consumers populated, tokenops_forecast has >=2 daily buckets, tokenops_scorecard reflects real data not synthetic defaults.

tasks.title: Async coaching batch pipeline
tasks.description: Queue expensive sessions for off-peak coaching. Concurrency and cost budget config.

tasks.title: Implement Security Finding Signal Governance
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Security Finding Signal Governance. Harden nox signal quality by formalizing a false-positive governance policy: classify scanner findings (real issue vs acceptable pattern), keep scoped excludes minimal, and require documented rationale + periodic review for every suppression path.

tasks.title: Split catalog: Claude Max 5x/20x + OpenAI window caps
tasks.description: Replace generic claude-max with claude-max-5x (~50 msgs/5h) and claude-max-20x (~200-800 msgs/5h, use lower bound). Add claude-pro window cap (~45 msgs/5h). Add gpt-plus window cap (~80 msgs/3h on GPT-4o), gpt-team (~120 msgs/3h), gpt-pro (unpublished). Update SourceURLs with dated 2026-05 references. Update plans_test.go required-plan list. README and docs/plan-cost-model.md tables updated.

tasks.title: MCP serve hot-reloads on config.yaml change
tasks.description: cli/serve.go fsnotify-watches the resolved config path. On Write events, reload Config, refresh PlanDeps + ControlDeps Config pointers, log 'config reloaded' with diff (added/removed/changed plans + providers). Atomic swap behind a sync.RWMutex on the deps. Acceptance: tokenops plan set anthropic claude-pro changes session_budget output without restarting MCP host; integration test seeds a config, modifies it, asserts the new value flows through after a sub-second debounce.

tasks.title: OpenAI SDK base-URL shim
tasks.description: Drop-in OPENAI_BASE_URL override. Python + Node SDK docs. Auth passthrough validated.

tasks.title: Implement Forecasting and Governance
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Forecasting and Governance. Weekly limit tracking budget alerts usage forecasting anomaly detection.

tasks.title: Per-agent/model/workflow aggregation
tasks.description: Rollup queries over event store. Time-bucketed aggregates. Streaming updates for live views.

tasks.title: Anthropic SDK base-URL shim
tasks.description: ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL override. Streaming validation. Python + Node SDK docs.

tasks.title: Implement `tokenops init` CLI wizard
tasks.description: Add internal/cli init subcommand. Behaviour: detect existing config; if absent, write default config to platform path ($XDG_CONFIG_HOME/tokenops/config.yaml or ~/.config/tokenops/config.yaml on darwin/linux); enable Storage with sqlite path at $XDG_DATA_HOME/tokenops/db (or ~/.tokenops/db), enable Audit, enable Rules with Root=$PWD and RepoID=basename($PWD), keep TLS off, leave Providers empty (user adds later). Idempotent: re-running detects existing config and prints diff or no-op message. Flags: --force overwrite, --print-only dry-run. Acceptance: cmd/tokenops integration test runs init twice; second run reports no changes; resulting config passes Config.Load round-trip.

tasks.title: Prompt compression optimizer
tasks.description: Local-first compression algorithm (LLMLingua-style). Quality threshold check. Savings calculation.

tasks.title: Bootstrap Go monorepo + tooling
tasks.description: Init Go workspace with modules for proxy, cli, sdk, optimizer, observability, coaching. Makefile, golangci-lint, GitHub Actions CI. LICENSE Apache 2.0, README, CONTRIBUTING.

tasks.title: CHANGELOG + README sweep for honesty cycle
tasks.description: Unreleased entry covers signal_quality, empty-state checklist, synthetic banner, hot-reload, alias shim. README quickstart adds a one-line note: 'session_budget is an MCP-ping heuristic until you wire the proxy; the response payload tells you so.' docs/plan-cost-model.md cross-links signal_quality levels.

tasks.title: Response and embedding cache
tasks.description: Content-hash keyed cache with TTL. Eviction policy. Cache hit metrics emitted. Bypass headers.

tasks.title: Optimization opportunities list
tasks.description: List with savings estimate, accept/reject, one-click apply where safe.

tasks.title: Spend engine honors CostSource
tasks.description: Update internal/contexts/spend/spend/engine.go so that PromptEvents with CostSource=plan_included have CostUSD set to 0 (overriding any per-token computation) and a separate plan_quota_tokens counter accrues. Trial = 0 cost, no quota. Backward compat: missing CostSource treated as metered. Update analytics aggregator queries: cost_usd remains the metered sum; new column/derived field `plan_quota_tokens` exposed. Acceptance: existing metered events unchanged; plan events register zero spend but full token consumption.

tasks.title: Synthetic-data banner on cost/headroom responses
tasks.description: When the queried window contains source=demo events at > 10% of total event count, attach a top-level data_warning to spend_summary / top_consumers / burn_rate / forecast / plan_headroom / session_budget responses: {synthetic_ratio_pct, real_event_count, demo_event_count, hint: 'Synthetic events dominate. Disable demo with `tokenops demo --reset` or include via include_demo: true'}. Pure derivation; lives in analytics + plans layer. Acceptance: response carries data_warning only when synthetic>10% AND default exclude is in effect (include_demo=false).

tasks.title: Audit log of TokenOps actions
tasks.description: Append-only audit log for config changes, optimization accepts, telemetry toggles.

tasks.title: Define plan catalog with quotas
tasks.description: Create internal/contexts/spend/plans package. Provide Plan struct (Name, Provider, InputTokensPerMonth, OutputTokensPerMonth, RequestsPerMonth, RateLimitWindow). Seed catalog: claude-max, claude-pro, claude-code-max, claude-code-pro, gpt-plus, gpt-pro, gpt-team, copilot-individual, copilot-business, cursor-pro, cursor-business with publicly documented limits as of 2026-05. Each entry includes a source URL comment for verification. Acceptance: catalog test asserts every plan has positive quotas and a non-empty source comment.

tasks.title: Customer interview scaffolding: 5-user discovery sprint
tasks.description: Add docs/customer-discovery.md with: (1) story-based interview script (Torres methodology) targeting the struggling moment 'tell me about the last time you ran into a rate limit on your AI subscription', (2) a tracker template (markdown table) capturing date / handle / plan / what-they-tried / what-they-wished-existed / quote, (3) follow-up question banks for different paths (Claude Code session interrupted, Cursor cap, Copilot premium-request math, multi-provider workflow). This is research scaffolding, not code; it unblocks the maintainer doing the 5 interviews this week. Acceptance: doc reviewed by maintainer, interview script can be opened on a call without further prep.

tasks.title: Tier 1: markdown summary on cost/headroom MCP responses
tasks.description: Every tokenops_spend_summary, tokenops_top_consumers, tokenops_burn_rate, tokenops_forecast, tokenops_plan_headroom, tokenops_session_budget response carries both: (a) human-friendly markdown summary as primary text content (renders styled in Desktop/Code/Cursor), (b) structured JSON appendix in a code block for agent parsing. Helper: mcp.markdownPayload(summaryMD string, structured any) returns the wrapped string. Smoke test in Claude Desktop: visible table rendering. Acceptance: tokenops_session_budget renders a styled table with window pct + recommended_action highlighted instead of brace soup.

tasks.title: Adaptive model routing
tasks.description: Cost/latency/quality-aware routing. Configurable policy. Fallback chains. Routing decisions emitted.

tasks.title: CLI + MCP surface for plan headroom
tasks.description: Add `tokenops plan` subcommand (list configured plans, show current headroom). Add `tokenops_plan_headroom` MCP tool returning HeadroomReport JSON. Update `tokenops scorecard` to include a Plan section when plans configured. Update `tokenops_spend_summary` to add `plan_included_tokens` alongside metered cost. Acceptance: CLI + MCP both render HeadroomReport; scorecard includes plan rows only when plans is non-empty.

tasks.title: Proxy overhead benchmark
tasks.description: Benchmark harness for typical request mix. Validate sub-50ms p99. CI regression gate.

tasks.title: Data retention configuration
tasks.description: Configurable retention windows per event type. Background pruning job.

tasks.title: Rule intelligence dashboard panels
tasks.description: Vue panels: rule ROI leaderboard, conflict list, compression preview, dynamic injection routing log, benchmark trends.

tasks.title: Split --include-demo into per-source opt-in flags
tasks.description: Today --include-demo on CLI + include_demo on MCP clears the entire ExcludeSources list, so it also surfaces mcp-session pings — operators meaning 'show me synthetic seeds' get the activity-proxy events folded in too. Split into --include-source=demo,mcp-session,replay (CLI repeatable flag) plus include_sources []string on MCP tool inputs. Keep --include-demo as a back-compat alias that expands to --include-source=demo. Update analytics.Filter resolution: caller-supplied includes are union'd against DefaultExcludedSources. Acceptance: tokenops spend --include-source=demo surfaces demo events only; --include-source=demo,mcp-session surfaces both; bare --include-demo still works.

tasks.title: OTLP export of rule events

tasks.title: Implement TokenOps CLI
tasks.description: Implement the feature: TokenOps CLI. Command-line interface for daemon management replay optimization analysis status coaching.

tasks.title: SQLite local event store

tasks.title: Dynamic rule injection / relevance routing
tasks.description: Replace static rule blob injection with relevance-routed subset per request: pick rules by workflow, file globs, tool calls, repo. Latency-budgeted. Records selection rationale into RuleAnalysisEvent. Proxy hook + MCP exposure.

tasks.title: Launch outreach plan doc + 10-user tracker
tasks.description: Add docs/launch-plan.md: 90-second Loom outline (script + 3 scenes), Show HN post body (title + first paragraph + first comment thread plant), Discord cross-post snippet for Claude Builders / Cursor / aider / AI Engineer Foundation, 25-founder DM template (parameterised with their last AI-workflow tweet). Sibling docs/launch-tracker.md with 10 rows ready to fill in: handle, channel, install confirmed, discovery-call booked, quote. This is research-shaped, not code-shaped. Acceptance: maintainer can open the doc and act on Day 1 without further prep.

tasks.title: Implement Client Integrations
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Client Integrations. First-party integrations across CLI ecosystem IDEs SDK ecosystem.

tasks.title: Vue dashboard scaffold
tasks.description: Vue 3 + Vite app, build, dev server, routing, layout, design tokens. API client for proxy daemon.

tasks.title: Proxy daemon skeleton
tasks.description: HTTP server, config loading, structured logging, graceful shutdown, health endpoint, lifecycle commands.

tasks.title: Structured-error hint sweep: include exact next command
tasks.description: Every `hint:` string in proxy/disabled.go, mcp/plan_tools.go, mcp/control_tools.go, daemon blockers must contain the literal command the user should run, not the variable name. e.g. swap 'set TOKENOPS_PLAN_<PROVIDER>' for 'run `tokenops plan set anthropic claude-max-20x`'. Also extend config.NextActionsFor to emit the new tokenops verbs. Tests in proxy/handlers_test.go and mcp/control_tools_test.go assert hint strings contain the verb. Acceptance: every disabled-subsystem path returns a hint a non-expert can copy/paste.

tasks.title: Budget thresholds and alerts
tasks.description: Configurable daily/weekly budget limits. CLI + dashboard notifications. Forecast-based early warning.

tasks.title: Extend HeadroomReport with window fields
tasks.description: HeadroomReport gains WindowConsumed, WindowCap, WindowPct, WindowResetsAt, WindowUnit fields (json: window_*). ComputeHeadroom accepts a new HeadroomInputs.WindowConsumed. Risk classifier prefers window signal when monthly cap absent: window_pct>=80 = high, >=60 = medium. Update headroom_test.go with 3 new scenarios.

tasks.title: Ship `tokenops plan set` + generalize to subsystem set
tasks.description: Add `tokenops plan set <provider> <plan>` and `tokenops plan unset <provider>` that read the active config file, mutate Plans map, write back with comment preservation if possible (gopkg.in/yaml.v3 Node API). Detects config file via the same resolver init uses ($XDG_CONFIG_HOME/tokenops/config.yaml or ~/.config/tokenops/config.yaml). If config missing, prompts user to run `tokenops init`. Mirror the pattern (skeleton + helper) for `tokenops provider set|unset` and `tokenops rules set-root` in the same PR so the verb is established. Tests: round-trip set/unset, missing-config error, unknown-plan rejection (delegates to plans.Validate), idempotency. Acceptance: `tokenops plan set anthropic claude-max-20x` writes Plans.anthropic into config.yaml; subsequent `tokenops plan list` reflects it; restart of MCP server picks up the change.

tasks.title: CLI skeleton with cobra
tasks.description: Cobra CLI. Daemon lifecycle. Config (file + env + flags). Cross-platform binaries.

tasks.title: Auto-wrap MCP tools with session tracker
tasks.description: Today only plan_headroom + session_budget call Tracker.Record. Investigate mcp-go middleware/hook API; if present, register one wrapper that fires for every tool invocation. If absent, expose a small helper mcp.RecordTool(d, toolName) that every Handler calls in one line at the top (consistent grep target). Acceptance: every tokenops_* MCP invocation lands as a session.Tracker ping; window_consumed advances on spend_summary calls etc.

tasks.title: Implement Branch Protection Compliance Guardrail
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Branch Protection Compliance Guardrail. Define and enforce a strict PR-only workflow for protected branches. Add repository guardrails and team runbook so AI/CLI automation never pushes directly to main. Include branch-protection compliance checks in contribution workflow.

tasks.title: Update README + docs quickstart for init/demo
tasks.description: README + docs/operator-golden-path.md: replace manual config instructions with 3-command quickstart (install → tokenops init → tokenops demo → tokenops status). Reference blockers[] + next_actions[]. Add troubleshooting subsection pointing at structured errors. Acceptance: README first-run section reaches first scorecard within 3 commands; smoke-test via shell in CI optional.

tasks.title: LangChain callback handler
tasks.description: LangChain callback emitting TokenOps events. Python package. Examples + docs.

tasks.title: Local model integration via Ollama
tasks.description: Pluggable local model backend for coaching. Default Ollama; OpenAI-compatible local servers also supported.

tasks.title: Waste pattern detector
tasks.description: Detect duplicate context, oversized retrieval, redundant system prompts, recursive agent loops.

tasks.title: signal_quality field on session_budget + plan_headroom
tasks.description: Every SessionBudget + HeadroomReport gains a SignalQuality struct: Level (low|medium|high), Source (mcp_tool_pings|proxy_traffic|vendor_usage_api), Caveat (operator-facing one-sentence disclaimer), UpgradePaths ([]string). Today every response is Level=low / Source=mcp_tool_pings. When the proxy is wired (cfg.Providers non-empty) and proxy events outnumber mcp-session events, bump to high. Pure derivation in plans/signal.go. Update json struct tags. Tests for every level transition. Acceptance: response payload always carries signal_quality.level + signal_quality.caveat; agents can branch on the enum.

tasks.title: Implement Dashboard
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Dashboard. Vue web dashboard for live token usage spend attribution forecasts agent analytics optimization opportunities.

tasks.title: Implement Optimization Quality Evals Framework
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Optimization Quality Evals Framework. Implement AI optimization evaluation harness with offline replay datasets and quality regression gates. Track task-success, regenerate rate, estimated token savings, and quality drift before enabling broader optimization defaults.

tasks.title: Rule conflict and redundancy detector
tasks.description: Detect conflicting operational guidance (e.g., be concise vs explain thoroughly), duplicated instructions across rule sources, drift between AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md. Output structured findings with rationale.

tasks.title: Implement Observability Platform
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Observability Platform. Token analytics spend tracking workflow attribution latency tracking efficiency scoring.

tasks.title: Per-rule token cost + section breakdown
tasks.description: Section-level token analysis: tokenize each rule block per provider, attribute tokens, expose density metrics. Emits RuleAnalysisEvent. CLI-friendly summaries.

tasks.title: Event emission from proxy
tasks.description: Wire interception to event bus. Emit Prompt and Workflow events with tokens, latency, provider, model, hash, context size. Async non-blocking.

tasks.title: tokenops vendor-usage backfill --hours N
tasks.description: One-shot CLI command that calls Anthropic Admin API for [now-N, now] and inserts the bucket events into the local store. Used on first config so the operator sees history immediately instead of waiting for the 5-min poll loop to fill in. Acceptance: command honours config.vendor_usage.anthropic.admin_key; dry-run mode prints what would be inserted; respects existing store dedup on envelope ID.

tasks.title: Gemini SDK base-URL shim
tasks.description: Gemini API base URL override. Streaming + non-streaming. SDK docs.

tasks.title: Rule corpus compression (distillation)
tasks.description: Compress large rule corpora into distilled behavioral representation. Semantic dedup + section pruning + minimum-viable instruction set. Reuses opt-prompt-compress primitives. Quality gate against rule benchmark.

tasks.title: CLI spend/forecast/burn commands
tasks.description: Current spend, burn rate, weekly forecast, top consumers. Terminal tables and sparklines.

tasks.title: Persist dashboard filter selections in localStorage
tasks.description: When the operator picks a provider/model/window in the dashboard, persist the selection in localStorage and rehydrate on page load so a browser refresh keeps the chosen view. Acceptance: refresh preserves filter state across sessions; clearing localStorage resets to defaults.

tasks.title: Add Mistral Le Chat Pro + Codex Plus plan catalog entries
tasks.description: Extend plans.Catalog with mistral-le-chat-pro + codex-plus rows (rate-limit windows, message caps, public source URL pins). Update DefaultTable in spend/pricing.go to include Mistral pricing for blended cost. Acceptance: tokenops plan list shows both; tokenops plan set mistral mistral-le-chat-pro succeeds.

tasks.title: Expose real vs synthetic event ratio
tasks.description: Add tokenops_data_sources MCP tool + matching `tokenops data sources` CLI returning {source: count} for the active window. tokenops_status response gains a `data_sources` map alongside blockers/next_actions so operators see at-a-glance whether their headroom math is on real or seeded data. Acceptance: after tokenops demo, status shows {demo: 280, mcp-session: N}; after a real proxy request lands, the proxy bucket increments.

tasks.title: README + CHANGELOG sweep for wedge
tasks.description: README quickstart updated to show `tokenops plan set` instead of env-var-or-JSON-edit instructions. Add a 'MCP-first usage' section: install → `tokenops init` → `tokenops plan set anthropic claude-max-20x` → connect MCP → `tokenops_session_budget` returns live data. CHANGELOG entry under Unreleased detailing the verb pattern + session observer + budget tool. docs/plan-cost-model.md updated to reflect that proxy is not the primary observation surface anymore.

tasks.title: Window-bounded consumption reader
tasks.description: Add ConsumptionInWindow(ctx, reader, provider, now, window) returning request count + token sum over the last `window` duration. Sibling to ConsumptionFor. Filters by CostSource=plan_included. Tests: 5h window, 3h window, no-events case, provider mismatch.

tasks.title: Filter synthetic demo events from default analytics
tasks.description: Analytics queries (spend/burn/top/forecast/scorecard) currently mix Source=demo with Source=proxy/mcp-session. Add a Filter.IncludeSources whitelist (default proxy+mcp-session+otlp; demo excluded). Surface --include-demo flag on CLI subcommands and a per-tool input on relevant MCP tools. Acceptance: after tokenops demo seeds 280 events, tokenops_spend_summary returns 0 by default; same call with include_demo=true returns the seeded total. Real events from proxy/MCP-session bypass the filter.

tasks.title: Dashboard favicon + browser-tab title polish
tasks.description: Embed a small SVG/ICO favicon into the dashboard HTML so browser tabs show a recognizable icon instead of the default globe. Acceptance: favicon visible in tab; HTML <head> gains <link rel="icon">; no extra HTTP roundtrip (inline data URL).

tasks.title: RBAC scaffold
tasks.description: Role definitions admin/operator/viewer. API surface aware of roles. Enforcement post-MVP.

tasks.title: Implement Risk-Based Test Coverage Uplift
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Risk-Based Test Coverage Uplift. Introduce repository-level quality debt dashboard for low-coverage/high-risk packages (e.g., daemon entrypoints and integration surfaces). Add targeted tests and risk-ranked coverage goals rather than blanket percentage targets.

tasks.title: Plan headroom + overage metrics
tasks.description: Add internal/contexts/spend/plans/headroom.go with HeadroomReport (PlanName, QuotaTokens, ConsumedTokens, ConsumedPct, HeadroomDays, OverageRisk). Computes ConsumedPct from current month's plan_quota_tokens vs catalog quota; HeadroomDays via linear extrapolation of last 7-day burn rate; OverageRisk=high when ConsumedPct>=80 AND HeadroomDays<remaining days in month. Acceptance: 80%+ consumption with 3 days left = high; <50% with full month left = low.

tasks.title: Wire llm.Backend into coaching.Pipeline with per-event summary
tasks.description: Pipeline gains optional LLM field; when set, process() generates a 1-2 sentence natural-language summary of the CoachingEvent and stamps it onto the envelope (CoachingEvent.Summary string field, omitempty). When unset, pipeline behaves as today (heuristic-only). Test: fake Backend returns canned summary; assert envelope.Payload.(*CoachingEvent).Summary matches. Acceptance: pipeline test passes with both backends and a mock detector.

tasks.title: Claude Code CLI integration
tasks.description: Document and script Claude Code env setup pointing at TokenOps proxy. End-to-end smoke test.

tasks.title: Fix rulesfs walker permission-denied tolerance
tasks.description: Internal/infra/rulesfs/source.go Discover() bails on first WalkDir error, killing the walk when scanning $HOME hits permission-denied on ~/Library/Saved Application State / Containers etc. Fix: when err is fs.ErrPermission, return fs.SkipDir for directories, nil for files; otherwise propagate. Extend skip list (vendor, node_modules) with Library/, Containers/, .Trash/. Test in internal/infra/rulesfs/source_test.go with synthetic fs.FS injecting EACCES on a sibling. Acceptance: tokenops rules analyze --root ~ discovers ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md without exiting non-zero.

tasks.title: Pricing tables and spend computation
tasks.description: Per-provider pricing config (input/output rates by model). Live spend per event. Currency support.

tasks.title: tokenops_help MCP tool with curated subset
tasks.description: 22 MCP tools flat with no grouping — Hick's law overload. Add tokenops_help returning {categories: [{name, description, tools: [{name, summary, example}]}]}. Categories: setup (init, plan_set, provider_set), cost (spend_summary, burn_rate, top_consumers, forecast), session (plan_headroom, session_budget, data_sources), workflow (workflow_trace, optimizations), rules (rules_analyze, rules_inject, rules_compress), debug (status, version, config, domain_events, audit). Acceptance: tokenops_help returns < 5KB JSON; every shipped tool appears in exactly one category; categories ordered by typical first-time use.

tasks.title: Docs site and integration guides
tasks.description: VitePress or mkdocs site. Quickstart, integration guides, architecture overview, runbook.

tasks.title: tokenops dashboard rotate-token CLI
tasks.description: Mint a fresh dashboard token, atomic-write to ~/.tokenops/dashboard.token, prompt operator to restart daemon for the new value to take effect. Acceptance: command idempotent; old token invalidated on next daemon start; --json emits new token for scripting.

tasks.title: Semantic deduplication
tasks.description: Detect and merge repeated context across turns. Embedding-based similarity. Threshold config.

tasks.title: Docs + CHANGELOG for window headroom
tasks.description: Update README plan table + docs/plan-cost-model.md with new plan IDs, window semantics, and example output. CHANGELOG entry under Unreleased detailing schema changes (Plan.MessagesPerWindow, HeadroomReport.Window*).

tasks.title: Rule benchmarking harness
tasks.description: Offline harness benchmarking rule systems against replay datasets: task success, regen rate, tokens, quality drift. Plugs into optimization-quality-evals-framework. Compare profiles (e.g., Go backend, refactor, PR review).

tasks.title: Workflow timeline view
tasks.description: Per-workflow step-by-step timeline. Context growth viz. Optimizations applied.

tasks.title: MCP-side session traffic observer
tasks.description: Wrap mcp.Server to count every tool invocation per provider+session. Add internal/contexts/spend/session package with SessionTracker: Increment(provider, tokens, model) and Window(provider, window) returning MessagesInWindow + TokensInWindow. Wire from internal/cli/serve.go so every MCP tool call (from Claude Code, Cursor, etc.) registers as a plan-included PromptEvent envelope with CostSource=plan_included, Provider derived from the configured Plans map (single-provider deployments unambiguous; multi-provider deployments use a configured default). This is the key wedge: TokenOps becomes useful without operator pointing any client at the proxy. Tests: fake MCP wrapper records 3 calls, SessionTracker reports correct window count. Acceptance: tokenops_plan_headroom returns non-zero window_consumed after the MCP host has issued any tokenops_* tool call.

tasks.title: Extend Plan struct with window cap fields
tasks.description: Add MessagesPerWindow int64 + WindowUnit string ('messages'|'requests') fields to internal/contexts/spend/plans.Plan. Existing RateLimitWindow stays. Update catalog test to assert each entry sets a coherent (Window, WindowCap, WindowUnit) tuple OR documents 'unpublished' explicitly. No catalog data changes in this task — just schema + validation.

tasks.title: Spend forecast charts
tasks.description: Forecast chart with confidence bands. Budget overlay. Anomaly markers.

tasks.title: tokenops init wizard: auto-detect installed AI clients + bind plans
tasks.description: Replace the silent default config write with an interactive wizard. Detection signatures: Claude Code (~/.claude*, $CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH, claude binary on PATH) -> ask Max 5x/20x/Pro; Claude Desktop (claude_desktop_config.json present) -> assume Max unless told otherwise; Cursor ($CURSOR_API_KEY or ~/.cursor/) -> ask Pro/Business; GitHub Copilot (gh extension list shows copilot, /tmp/.copilot tokens) -> ask Individual/Business; raw ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / OPENAI_API_KEY without OAuth -> API user, skip plan binding. --non-interactive flag skips prompts and writes only high-confidence detections. Acceptance: `tokenops init` on a machine with Claude Code + Cursor installed prompts once each and writes plans.anthropic + plans.cursor.

tasks.title: Codex CLI integration
tasks.description: Codex CLI env setup. Smoke test.

tasks.title: Context window trimming
tasks.description: Configurable retention policies (system always, last N turns, summarize older).

tasks.title: Tier 2: SVG sparklines for burn rate + window headroom
tasks.description: Add internal/mcp/render/svg.go: tiny SVG generator for sparkline (burn rate hourly) and bar (window consumed). Return as ResourceContent with MimeType=image/svg+xml alongside the JSON payload. mcp-go ResourceContent supports it directly. Smoke test: Claude Desktop renders the SVG inline below the tool response. Acceptance: tokenops_burn_rate returns an embedded sparkline that visualises the 24h cost series.

tasks.title: CLI replay command
tasks.description: tokenops replay session-id. Waste analysis, suggestions, savings, side-by-side diff.
